name: SmartCovers
overview: Cover extraction for books, audiobooks, comics, and music — with online fallback via Open Library & Google Books.
description: Cover provider for Jellyfin libraries. Renders PDF first pages via built-in PDFium (no external tools needed), searches EPUB archives for cover images, and extracts embedded artwork from audio files via ffmpeg. When local extraction fails, automatically fetches covers from Open Library and Google Books as a last resort.

versions.changelog: Address review findings: stricter BMP validation (DIB header check), exclude unverifiable TIFF entries from comic candidate selection, bounded single-pass candidate selection for pathological archives, and ship THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES.md inside the plugin zip.

CBZ/CBR comic-archive cover extraction: first page in natural order (or an explicitly named cover entry), content-sniffed format detection so mislabeled archives work, RAR4/RAR5/solid support, junk filtering and magic-byte verification. BMP artwork detection added.

Fix a crash that could take down the whole Jellyfin server when the PDFium native library failed to load. Restore PDF cover rendering on Windows (x64/x86/arm64). Honor the JPEG quality setting. Harden native-library resolution across platforms.
Built-in PDF rendering via PDFium (no poppler-utils needed). Music library support. SkiaSharp 3.x compatibility.
Rename to SmartCovers (Jellyfin branding compliance). All namespaces, DLL, and provider names updated.
